note: judge-rho vs relabel val labels, n=121, mix dose-response (2026-07-04)
hypothesis: negatives (old-distribution invalid-PHP judge targets) fight relabel calibration; both negative-containing mixes collapse to ~0.73 regardless of replay level
conclusion: judge-rho tracks judge-exposure share monotonically (0.827@85% -> 0.74@66%+neg -> 0.65@66%). Mix search closed.
